main.title:

main.heroTitle: Plan your loans with more clarity every day
main.heroDesc: Estimate payments, explore loan scenarios, and keep your calculations organized in one place.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Loan
mortgage.desc: Calculate monthly mortgage payments and total borrowing cost with a clearer overview.

car.title: Car Loan
car.desc: Plan auto loan payments and interest costs with an easier monthly view.

personal.title: Personal Loan
personal.desc: Estimate monthly installments and repayment schedules for personal needs.

business.title: Business Loan
business.desc: Analyze loan options to improve cash flow and business financing decisions.

mortgageResult.summaryDesc: A quick snapshot of your borrowing plan and repayment outlook.

aboutContent.description: Nexa Tech is a small, agile development team dedicated to building and shipping practical, free digital solutions. We specialize in creating web and mobile applications to solve common daily challenges.
aboutContent.mission: Our mission is to solve everyday needs by creating high-quality, free digital products including web apps, mobile apps, and open-source tools.

features.title: Core Values
features.f1: Building practical products for immediate use

termsContent.title: TERMS OF SERVICE
termsContent.intro: Welcome to Nexa Loan. By using our app, you agree to the following terms:

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing or using Nexa Loan, you agree to be bound by these Terms and all applicable laws and regulations.

section2.title: 2. Use of Service
section2.content: You agree to use the app for lawful purposes and not to violate the rights of any third party.

section3.title: 3. Intellectual Property
section3.content: All content, logos, and designs of Nexa Loan are our copyright. You may not copy them without consent.

section4.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
section4.content: We are not responsible for any financial loss arising from the use of calculation results on the app. The numbers are for reference only.

privacyContent.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacyContent.intro: Nexa Loan is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your information.

section1.title: 1. Information Collection
section1.content: We collect information you provide directly when using app features such as loan amount and term.

section2.title: 2. Information Use
section2.content: The information is used to perform calculations and improve user experience.

section3.title: 3. Data Security
section3.content: We apply strict security measures to ensure the safety of your personal data.

section4.title: 4. Your Rights
section4.content: You have the right to request to view, edit, or delete your personal information at any time.

noti.title: Feature Coming Soon
noti.desc: We're currently working on this feature. Please check back later to try it out!
